body:
If you're looking for **custom-designed garage doors** rather than just installers or repair companies, I'd focus on firms that offer design consultations, premium manufacturers (such as custom wood, aluminum/glass, or carriage-house styles), and in-house installation.

Here are some of the strongest options in the East Bay:

  1. All Bay Garage Doors (San Leandro)

 * Excellent reputation (4.9★ with 300+ reviews).

 * Offers custom residential garage doors, modern glass, carriage-house, and insulated designs.

 * Good choice if you want help selecting a door that complements a remodel or new build.

  2. Contra Costa Door (Concord)

 * Long-established East Bay company specializing in higher-end residential doors.

 * Works with several premium manufacturers and custom configurations.

 * Particularly good for traditional and carriage-style homes.

  3. R&Q Overhead Doors Walnut Creek

 * Highly rated local company (5.0★).

 * Known for personalized service and custom residential installations.

 * Good option if you're in Walnut Creek, Lafayette, Alamo, or Danville.

  4. R&S Erection Of Southern Alameda County

 * One of the Bay Area's most established commercial and residential door companies.

 * Excellent if your project involves oversized, architectural, or specialty doors.

 * Carries a broad selection of premium manufacturers.

  5. Precision Garage Door of Bay Area

 * Large showroom and online garage door design tools.

 * Offers contemporary glass, custom wood, carriage-house, and steel doors with free design consultations. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[About Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/about?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### If design is your top priority

For homeowners investing in curb appeal, I'd ask whether the company can source from manufacturers like:

  * Clopay

  * Amarr

  * Wayne Dalton

  * Martin Door

  * CHI Overhead Doors

These brands offer extensive customization in:

  * Natural wood (cedar, redwood, mahogany)

  * Contemporary aluminum-and-glass

  * Steel with wood-look finishes

  * Custom paint colors

  * Oversized and architect-designed doors

### For luxury homes ($8k–$20k+)

If you're building or renovating a higher-end home in places like Orinda, Lafayette, Alamo, or Piedmont, I'd lean toward:

  * Contra Costa Door

  * R&S Erection Of Southern Alameda County

  * All Bay Garage Doors

These companies are generally better equipped for fully customized projects than repair-focused businesses.

If your goal is an **architectural statement piece** , I can also recommend manufacturers and local dealers that specialize in **flush modern wood** , **frameless glass** , or **pivot-style** garage doors.  

Give feedback
